Requirement Summary: Admit bounded Windows host runtime discovery facts from registry-view and documented-root observations, normalized into public-safe candidate facts without raw registry output, exact private installed paths, LabVIEWCLI execution, or compare execution.

Admit deterministic Linux documented-root discovery and macOS unavailable constraints for host runtime validation without arbitrary filesystem walking, PATH probing, environment probing, or execution.

Generate discovered host candidate facts that compose into the existing host runtime preflight contract for exactly one compatible host LabVIEW plus LabVIEWCLI candidate or deterministic fail-closed outcomes.

Feed discovered host candidate facts through the existing host runtime preflight and vihs --validate command chain without redesigning runtime outcome, readback, proof, proof-out, file-emission, command, or plan-only output shapes.
Preserve the governed Windows mixed-bitness host-validation rule when discovery facts show requested host/windows/2026/x64 with LabVIEW 2026 x64 plus the canonical installed x86 LabVIEWCLI surface.
